response: Prior to producing *Nine Days that Changed the World*, Newt Gingrich was the husband of Callista Gingrich, an American political aide, businesswoman, and author. He was also a former U.S. Representative and Speaker of the House, and he served as the executive director of the National Republican Congressional Committee. Additionally, he was involved in political consulting, working with organizations such as GOPAC and the American Solutions for Winning the Future PAC.
